title: Prima 2.5L Stainless Steel Whistling Kettle in Cream 11124C Kitchen, 2.5 liters, Beige
features: Generous 2.5 Litre Capacity: Perfect for boiling water for up to 10 cups, making it ideal for families or gatherings.
Classic Whistling Function: Features a traditional whistling mechanism to alert you when the water reaches boiling point, ensuring you never miss the perfect boil.
Durable Stainless Steel Construction: Made from high-quality stainless steel for long-lasting durability, resistance to rust, and easy maintenance.
Elegant Cream Finish: The stylish cream color adds a touch of sophistication and complements a variety of kitchen decors.
description: Enhance your kitchen with the Prima 2.5L Stainless Steel Whistling Kettle in Cream, a blend of functionality and elegance. With its generous 2.5-litre capacity, this kettle is ideal for boiling water for up to 10 cups, making it perfect for family meals, tea parties, or gatherings. The classic whistling function alerts you when the water reaches a boil, ensuring you never miss the optimal temperature for your beverages. Constructed from high-quality stainless steel, this kettle is designed for durability and long-lasting use, with resistance to rust and easy maintenance. The elegant cream finish adds a touch of sophistication to your kitchen, seamlessly complementing a variety of decor styles. The ergonomic, heat-resistant handle ensures safe and comfortable pouring, while the kettle's design is compatible with all heat sources, including gas, electric, and induction stovetops. Whether you're boiling water for tea, coffee, or other hot beverages, the Prima 2.5L Whistling Kettle combines practical functionality with a stylish appearance, making it a reliable and attractive addition to any kitchen. Enjoy effortless boiling and refined design with this essential kitchen tool.
